The genus Gleicheniastrum is a monotypic genus, containing only one species, G. speluncae. intro: Gleicheniastrum speluncae, also known as cave spleenwort, is a species of fern belonging to the family Gleicheniaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help in reducing swelling and oxidative stress in the body. The bioactive constituents of Gleicheniastrum speluncae include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and triterpenoids, which contribute to its medicinal properties.
